iti35:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti35:2.1:
“Monks, this holy life is lived, not for the sake of deceiving people, not for the sake of inveigling people,
not for the sake of the rewards of gain, offerings, & tribute, nor with the thought,
‘Thus may people know me.’
iti35:2.2: This holy life is lived for the sake of restraint & abandoning.”
iti35:3.1: For the sake of restraint, for the sake of abandoning, he, the Blessed One, taught
iti35:3.2: a holy life not handed down,
iti35:4.1: This path is pursued by those great in purpose,
iti35:4.4: as taught by the One Awakened, heeding the Teacher’s message,
iti35:4.5: will put an end to suffering & stress.
